title: On Elphinston's Translations. Of Martial's Epigrams.
content:
O thou, whom poesy abhors,
        Whom prose has turned out of doors,
        Heard'st thou that groan? proceed no further;
        'Twas laurell'd Martial roaring murther!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "On Elphinston's Translations. Of Martial's Epigrams."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
